author: Himanshu Pandey
tone: Clear, practical, trustworthy, developer-friendly, and written for US-facing businesses.
cta: If you need a website accessibility audit, WCAG remediation help, or PDF accessibility support, contact Himanshu Pandey through the website contact page.
topics: How small businesses can prepare for a WCAG accessibility audit
The most common ADA website accessibility issues on service business sites
How to explain accessibility fixes to developers without slowing delivery
What makes a PDF inaccessible and how remediation improves usability
Why visible focus indicators matter for keyboard users
How to prioritize accessibility issues after an audit
What website owners should know about screen reader testing
How accessible forms improve conversions and usability
How to spot accessibility issues on a homepage in ten minutes
The difference between automated scans and manual accessibility audits
